name: Nuclear/Cytoplasmic Fractionation Buffer A
nameCn: 核质分离裂解液 A (胞浆)

notes.en: Incubate on ice 15 min, add 10% NP-40 to final 0.6%, vortex 10 s, centrifuge at 4°C 14,000×g for 30 s. Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction.
notes.zh: 冰上孵育 15 min，加 10% NP-40 至终浓度 0.6%，涡旋 10 s，4°C 14,000×g 30 s。上清 = 胞浆。

ref: Bhatt et al. (2012) Methods Mol Biol 869:29; Suzuki et al. (2010) Nat Protoc 5:532–539

usage.en: Buffer A for cytoplasmic/nuclear fractionation (hypotonic lysis step).
usage.zh: 细胞质/细胞核分级分离缓冲液 A（低渗裂解步骤）。
